subject: [DMAAP-DR] Bump aaf_agent image version
commit_message:
[DMAAP-DR] Bump aaf_agent image version

Change-Id: Id4e93e6f21bf1914512220e3b8e31f8e8eda71d6
Signed-off-by: efiacor <fiachra.corcoran@est.tech>
Issue-ID: DMAAP-1416

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 7 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

This can be cherry picked onto your AAF patches if you like.
Ideally this image (aaf_agent) version should be set/maintained at top level global values as dependent components shouldn't be required to manage this.
